regulation_name: Consumer Protection (Certification and Standards Marks) Regulations 2010
citation: Consumer Protection (Certification and Standards Marks) Regulations 2010 — Regulation 5
summary: SIRIM, MS, and other certification marks may only be used for certified product scopes and valid periods.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: SIRIM, MS ISO, or halal/certification logo in ad creative. ACTION: WARN — verify certificate scope and validity. CHECK: Certificate number, product SKU scope, and expiry. ESCALATE IF: Expired certification or mark used beyond scope.
